tuning: E A D G B E
content:
I've seen a lot of really close tabs for this song, but I promise this one will work.
not the exact chords they used, but the chords are adjusted so that it can be played in 
standard tuning instead of tuned down a half-step, as it should be authentically.

**Capo 1**


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]                                  [ch]C[/ch]
  Look at this photograph, every time I do it makes me laugh,[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]G[/ch]                                   [ch]D[/ch]
How did our eyes get so red, and what the hell is on Joey's head?[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]A[/ch]                                      [ch]C[/ch]
And this is where I grew up, I think the present owner fixed it up,[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]G[/ch]                                          [ch]D[/ch]
I never knew we ever went without, the second floor is high for sneakin' out.[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]A[/ch]                                           [ch]C[/ch]
And this is where I went to school, most of the time had better things to do,[/tab]
[tab]                                  [ch]G[/ch]                                   [ch]D[/ch]
Criminal record says I broke in twice, I must have done half a dozen times.[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]A[/ch]                                     [ch]C[/ch]
I wonder if it's too late, should I go back and try to graduate,[/tab]
[tab]                                    [ch]G[/ch]
Life's better now than it was back then, if I was them I wouldn't let me[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
in...Oh oh oh... Oh God I![/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]                                              [ch]A[/ch]
Every memory of lookin' out the back door, I had the photo album spread[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]C[/ch]
out on my bedroom floor, It's hard to say it, time to say it[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  Goodbye, goodbye.[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]                                                 [ch]A[/ch]
Every memory of walkin' out the front door, I found the photo of the friend[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]C[/ch]
that I was looking for, It's hard to say it, time to say it[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  Goodbye, goodbye.[/tab]


[Interlude]

[ch]D[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]                                    [ch]C[/ch]
  Remember the old arcade? Blew every dollar that we ever made.[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]G[/ch]                                         [ch]D[/ch]
The cops hated us hangin' out, they say somebody went and burned it down.[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]A[/ch]                                      [ch]C[/ch]
We use to listen to the radio and sing along with every song we'd know.[/tab]
[tab]                                       [ch]G[/ch]
We said someday we'd find out how it feels to sing to more than just the[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]
steering wheel.[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]A[/ch]                                      [ch]C[/ch]
Kim's the first girl I kissed. I was so nervous that I nearly missed.[/tab]
[tab]                                  [ch]G[/ch]
She's had a couple of kids since then. I haven't seen her since God knows[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
when... Oh oh oh... Oh God I![/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]                                              [ch]A[/ch]
Every memory of lookin' out the back door, I had the photo album spread[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]C[/ch]
out on my bedroom floor, It's hard to say it, time to say it[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  Goodbye, goodbye.[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]                                                 [ch]A[/ch]
Every memory of walkin' out the front door, I found the photo of the friend[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]C[/ch]
that I was looking for, It's hard to say it, time to say it[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  Goodbye, goodbye.[/tab]


[Interlude]

[ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
  I miss that time, I miss their faces[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
You can't erase, you can't replace it.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
I miss it now. I can't believe it.[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
So hard to stay, too hard to leave it.[/tab]

[tab]                         [ch]A[/ch]                                          [ch]C[/ch]
If I could relive those days I know the one thing that would never change...[/tab]


[Final Chorus]

[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]                                              [ch]A[/ch]
Every memory of lookin' out the back door, I had the photo album spread[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]C[/ch]
out on my bedroom floor, It's hard to say it, time to say it[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  Goodbye, goodbye.[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]                                                 [ch]A[/ch]
Every memory of walkin' out the front door, I found the photo of the friend[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]C[/ch]
that I was looking for, It's hard to say it, time to say it[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  Goodbye, goodbye.[/tab]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]                                   [ch]C[/ch]
  Look at this photograph...every time I do it makes me laugh.[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]G[/ch]
Every time I do it makes me.[/tab]
